title: ProtocolSchemaManifest
description: Machine-readable schema for the protocol schema bundle manifest.

schemaStatus.description: Bundle status for the schema family or registry entry.

path.description: Workspace-relative path to the schema file within protocol/schemas/.

schema_id.description: Stable runtime schema identifier for the object family.

schema_version.description: Exact schema version string for the object family.

owner.description: Documentation owner for the object family.

note.description: Optional human-readable note clarifying placeholder or rollout semantics for the object family.

path.description: Workspace-relative path to the registry file within protocol/schemas/.

name.description: Registry name used in protocol field documentation.

namespace.description: Stable namespace prefix for machine-consumed registry values.

bundle_id.description: Stable identifier for this protocol schema bundle.

bundle_version.description: Bundle version string for the checked-in schema bundle.

json_schema_draft.description: JSON Schema draft version used by the bundle.

runtime_schema_prefix.description: Required prefix for runtime schema_id values owned by this bundle.

canonicalization.description: Canonicalization profile used for hashing and signing.

require_schema_id.description: Whether all top-level protocol objects must include schema_id.

require_schema_version.description: Whether all top-level protocol objects must include schema_version.

unknown_schema_posture.description: Failure posture for unknown top-level object families or versions.

top_level_object_requirements.description: Shared requirements applied to every persisted or cross-boundary top-level object.

schema_files.description: Authoritative list of object-family schemas shipped in this bundle.

registries.description: Authoritative list of machine-consumed code registries shipped in this bundle.
